result.summary: Found 2 visually broken layout issues: the top category row is cut off on the right, and the game grids show clipped cards on the right edge, suggesting horizontal overflow or an incorrect fixed-width layout.

issues.description: The top navigation/category pills are not fully visible; the rightmost tab is partially cut off at the screen edge.
issues.suggestion: Make the row scrollable with proper padding or reduce item widths so the full tab stays within the viewport.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the content grids are clipped on the right side, with only part of the card visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid to fit the available width, reduce column count on smaller screens, or enable proper horizontal scrolling if the row is meant to overflow.
